title: Is Davos a grift? Plus: globalist mishaps, debt ceilings, TikTok's endgame & more
description:
(0:00) Bestie intro, who gets credit for the podcast?

(6:27) Top candidates for the Republican nominee in 2024: DeSantis, Youngkin, Haley; major 2024 issues, balancing the budget

(19:13) WEF in Davos: is it a grift? Somber mood, globalist mishaps, evaluating the US free trade policy

(39:51) Rebuilding infrastructure while avoiding the debt ceiling, immigration reform

(1:00:42) TikTok's endgame in the US: banned, spun out, or something else?

(1:17:22) Pharma meets AI, best AI business models

analysis.summary: The All-In Podcast discusses various topics including the World Economic Forum in Davos, the 2024 US presidential election, TikTok's future in the US, and the intersection of pharma and AI. The hosts also debate whether Davos is a grift and evaluate the US free trade policy. Additionally, they touch on rebuilding infrastructure, avoiding the debt ceiling, and immigration reform.

takeaways.text: US free trade policy needs evaluation
Debt ceiling and infrastructure are concerns
2024 presidential election is a major issue

sentiment.notes: The hosts express caution about various topics, including the World Economic Forum in Davos and the future of TikTok in the US. They also discuss concerns about the US economy and politics.

notable_moments.description: Discussion about Davos being a grift
TikTok's future in the US is discussed
